title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: Get up and running with Llama 3.3, Phi-3, Mistral, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, list, copy, delete models via Python.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same CRUD & chat operations as Python.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use any Ollama model as an LLM or embeddings provider in LangChain apps.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for Ollama (formerly Ollama-WebUI); Markdown, code highlighting, model manager, multi-user.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; sync/async APIs, streaming, embeddings, model management.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing ergonomic async wrappers over Ollama’s REST API; chat, generate, pull, list.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot-like plugin powered by Ollama models for VS Code.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with optional GPU nodes and model preload.

title: ollama-chatbot-ui
summary: Clean Next.js chat interface for Ollama with streaming, chat history export, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models via slash commands.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot integration for Ollama; mention the bot to chat or generate text with any local model.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to run local LLM prompts inside notes using Ollama models.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin to generate, refactor, or explain code with Ollama models inside the editor.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Simple Bash CLI wrapper for quick model switching and prompt piping to Ollama.

title: ollama-express
summary: Starter template for building Express apps that expose OpenAI-compatible endpoints backed by Ollama.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat component that streams Ollama responses with session memory and model selector.

title: ollama-django
summary: Django app + REST API to serve Ollama models with user auth, rate limiting, and admin panel.

title: ollama-mlflow
summary: MLflow deployment plugin to treat Ollama as a local model serving backend for experiment tracking.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation demo using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector DB + LangChain.
